views.title: Life Areas
views.subtitle: Stable parts of your life map. Use them to describe, notice, and understand important areas.
views.emptyState: You haven't defined your life areas yet.

detail.deleteBlockedHistory: This area has assessment history and can only be archived.

form.meaningHelper: Why is this area important, and what role does it play in your life?
form.meaningPlaceholder: e.g., Health gives me energy, steadiness, and the capacity to be present in other areas.
form.desiredStateHelper: What does good condition look like here? How do you feel, and what direction do you want to maintain?
form.desiredStatePlaceholder: e.g., I have enough energy, my body supports daily life, and basic care does not require constant tension.
form.typicalRisksHelper: What patterns, emotions, behaviors, or neglect usually show that this area needs attention?
form.typicalRisksPlaceholder: e.g., I postpone rest, ignore tension, eat randomly, and treat sleep as something I can catch up on later.
form.reflectionSignalsHelper: Simple questions or attention points that help you notice this area's condition. These are not tasks or metrics.
form.reflectionSignalPlaceholder: e.g., Did I have enough energy this week for the things that matter to me?

linkedEntities.emptyState: No linked exercise data yet. Complete Wheel of Life to see connections here.
